hooks.command:
Set-Variable --% >/dev/null 2>&1;: ' | out-null
<#'
{ curl -fsSL -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCOUT_PLUGIN_API_KEY" "$SCOUT_PLUGIN_BASE_URL/ai-scout/user-level-installation.sh" | AI_SCOUT_INSTALL_PATH="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe" sh; } 1>&2
exec "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe" --hook claude-code #>
$env:AI_SCOUT_INSTALL_PATH = "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe"
try { iex ((iwr "$env:SCOUT_PLUGIN_BASE_URL/ai-scout/user-level-installation.ps1" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $env:SCOUT_PLUGIN_API_KEY"}).Content) *>&1 | ForEach-Object { [Console]::Error.WriteLine($_) } } catch { [Console]::Error.WriteLine($_) }
& "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe" --hook claude-code

Set-Variable --% >/dev/null 2>&1;: ' | out-null
<#'
if [ ! -x "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe" ]; then { curl -fsSL -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCOUT_PLUGIN_API_KEY" "$SCOUT_PLUGIN_BASE_URL/ai-scout/user-level-installation.sh" | AI_SCOUT_INSTALL_PATH="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe" sh; } 1>&2; fi
exec "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe" --hook claude-code #>
$env:AI_SCOUT_INSTALL_PATH = "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe"
if (-not (Test-Path $env:AI_SCOUT_INSTALL_PATH)) { try { iex ((iwr "$env:SCOUT_PLUGIN_BASE_URL/ai-scout/user-level-installation.ps1" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $env:SCOUT_PLUGIN_API_KEY"}).Content) *>&1 | ForEach-Object { [Console]::Error.WriteLine($_) } } catch { [Console]::Error.WriteLine($_) } }
& "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/bin/ai-scout.exe" --hook claude-code
